subject: Fw:
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
To: Jpm6929@aol.com
Sent: Tue, January 29, 2008 3:54:42 AM
Subject: 

Questions you will need to answer.. I was told that the big library book case would be ready in seen in paris dec 15.. what has happened since then.  i was told that francelli had to buy a machine to mill the large  toroid columns,  ( the photograph shows ordinary , wood glued together , and cut with a chain saw.  i was told that the wood was birch. I was told that the columns were finished in paris then reassembeled in italy. are the colums being stained or faux painted. and where? ( like the sample you sent).   I have been promised houses done by the venetian archiects as well as the modern ones. I have been promised spa details, for almost a year, . ( the last island plan shows a steam  room of 5feet. , with no understanding of a spa. )  J.p.  I would like to give you the opportunity to avoid a problem.. as I said on the phone, I will see you on wed in new york. please . the ground rules are simple.. I want the whole truth.  . I would also like an
accounting from Francelli of all money spent to date. for both the big library and the small office.. This is urgent . I want this from Francellis office. .
